"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\vk-test.dir/objects.a
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\vk-test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\vk-test.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\vk-test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ..\..\..\bin\vk-test_d.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libvk-test_d.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\vk-test.dir\linklibs.rsp
